subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-07-20
subcodes.first_line: Today I was thinking over the following subject: The heavenly farmer came and cleared the ground from thorns and thistles.
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @light and darkness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
